name: Day Trip: Ait Ben Haddou & Ouarzazate from Marrakech

seo.title: Ait Ben Haddou & Ouarzazate Day Trip from Marrakech | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private day trip from Marrakech: the ksar of Ait Ben Haddou (UNESCO), Ouarzazate (the 'Hollywood of the desert'). Tizi n'Tichka pass (2,260 m). Round-trip transport included.

hero.tagline: Ait Ben Haddou & Ouarzazate from Marrakech in one day

intro: Discover the ksar of Ait Ben Haddou, a UNESCO World Heritage site, and the town of Ouarzazate, nicknamed the 'Hollywood of the desert'. This day trip from Marrakech crosses the spectacular Tizi n'Tichka pass at 2,260 m altitude, offering exceptional views over the High Atlas.
